final:
// // This module implements a two-input, eight-bit wide demultiplexer with an enable signal.
module top_module(
  input [7:0] A,
  input [7:0] B,
  input EN,
  output reg [7:0] Y
);always @ (A, B, EN) begin
    if(EN) begin
      Y <= A;
    end
    else begin
      Y <= B;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a two-input, eight-bit wide demultiplexer with an enable signal.
